name: Mouse Genotyping PCR Workflow
nameCn: 小鼠基因分型 PCR 流程

usage.en: Complete workflow for mouse genotyping from tail lysis through PCR and gel electrophoresis.
usage.zh: 小鼠基因分型完整流程：尾巴裂解 → PCR → 琼脂糖凝胶电泳。

components.name: Step 1 (Tail lysis): Spin plate 3000 rpm, 4°C, 3 min to position tails. Prepare fresh lysis buffer: 17.5 µL 10 M NaOH + 14 µL 0.5 M EDTA + H₂O to 10 mL (per 130 tails). Add 75 µL per well.

note.en: Scale down to 5 mL for 65 tails.

components.name: Step 2: Seal plate. Run 'Tail-Lyse' thermal cycler protocol (~46 min).
Step 3: Spin 1000 rpm, 4°C, 1 min. Add 75 µL 40 mM Tris-HCl. Mix with pipette. Seal. Spin 1000 rpm, 4°C, 2 min. Store plate at 4°C.
Step 4 (Master mix): Prepare gene-specific master mix. Add Taq polymerase last.

note.en: Do NOT vortex or shake enzymes!
note.zh: 绝对不要涡旋或摇晃酶！

components.name: Step 5 (PCR setup): Add 22.5 µL master mix + Taq per well. Add 2.5 µL lysate sample. Seal and spin down briefly.
Step 6: Run PCR program (~2.5 h). Store at 4°C.
Step 7 (Gel): Prepare 2% agarose-TAE gel (4 g agarose + 200 mL TAE + 5 µL EtBr for large gel). Some genes need 3%.

note.zh: 查阅各基因所需凝胶浓度。

components.name: Step 8: Load 20 µL sample per well (8 µL 100 bp ladder in middle well). Run at 150-200 V for 15-20 min.
Step 9 (Imaging): Select 'Nucleic Acids / Ethidium Bromide', optimize 'Faint Bands', Filter 1. Position gel, run protocol, invert to view.

notes.en: Lysis buffer composition: ~17.5 mM NaOH + ~0.7 mM EDTA. After lysis, Tris-HCl neutralizes the NaOH. Master mix recipes are gene-specific — refer to genotyping database for primer sequences and PCR conditions. Some genes (2C-TCR, Pygo2) require overnight high-quality DNA isolation with proteinase K instead of quick alkaline lysis.
notes.zh: 裂解液组成：约 17.5 mM NaOH + 0.7 mM EDTA。裂解后 Tris-HCl 中和 NaOH。Master mix 配方因基因而异——参考基因分型数据库获取引物序列和 PCR 条件。某些基因（如 2C-TCR、Pygo2）需过夜 proteinase K 高质量 DNA 提取。

ref: Adapted from standard alkaline tail lysis protocol

label.zh: 实验方案 — 无需存储

note.en: Neutralized tail lysate can be stored at 4°C for up to 1 week or -20°C long-term
note.zh: 中和后的尾巴裂解液可 4°C 保存 1 周或 -20°C 长期保存

note.en: PCR products can be stored at 4°C overnight or -20°C before gel analysis
note.zh: PCR 产物可 4°C 过夜或 -20°C 保存后再进行凝胶分析

detailedSteps.en: Place tail snips in 96-well plate. Spin at 3,000 rpm, 4°C, 3 min to position tails at bottom
detailedSteps.zh: 将尾尖放入 96 孔板。3,000 rpm，4°C，离心 3 min 使尾尖沉至底部

detailedSteps.en: Prepare fresh alkaline lysis buffer: 17.5 µL 10 M NaOH + 14 µL 0.5 M EDTA + H₂O to 10 mL (for ~130 tails; scale to 5 mL for ~65 tails). Add 75 µL per well
detailedSteps.zh: 新鲜配制碱裂解液：17.5 µL 10 M NaOH + 14 µL 0.5 M EDTA + H₂O 至 10 mL（约 130 个尾巴；约 65 个缩至 5 mL）。每孔加 75 µL

detailedSteps.en: Seal plate with adhesive film. Run 'Tail-Lyse' thermal cycler program (~46 min)
detailedSteps.zh: 用封板膜密封。运行 'Tail-Lyse' 热循环程序（约 46 min）

detailedSteps.en: Spin at 1,000 rpm, 4°C, 1 min. Add 75 µL 40 mM Tris-HCl to neutralize. Mix by pipetting. Seal. Spin at 1,000 rpm, 4°C, 2 min. Store lysate plate at 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: 1,000 rpm，4°C 离心 1 min。加 75 µL 40 mM Tris-HCl 中和。吹打混匀。密封。1,000 rpm，4°C 离心 2 min。裂解液板 4°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: Prepare gene-specific master mix (22.5 µL per reaction). Add Taq polymerase last — do NOT vortex or shake enzymes
detailedSteps.zh: 配制基因特异性 Master Mix（每个反应 22.5 µL）。最后加 Taq 聚合酶 — 绝不涡旋或摇晃酶

detailedSteps.en: Dispense 22.5 µL master mix + Taq per well in new PCR plate. Add 2.5 µL tail lysate per well. Seal plate, spin down briefly
detailedSteps.zh: 新 PCR 板中每孔分装 22.5 µL Master Mix + Taq。每孔加 2.5 µL 尾巴裂解液。封板，短暂离心

detailedSteps.en: Run gene-specific PCR program (~2.5 h). Store products at 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: 运行基因特异性 PCR 程序（约 2.5 h）。产物 4°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: Prepare 2% agarose gel in TAE (4 g agarose + 200 mL TAE + 5 µL EtBr for large gel). Some genes require 3% gel — check gene-specific protocol
detailedSteps.zh: 配制 2% 琼脂糖凝胶（4 g 琼脂糖 + 200 mL TAE + 5 µL EtBr，大胶）。部分基因需 3% 凝胶 — 查阅基因特异性方案

detailedSteps.en: Load 20 µL PCR product per well. Load 8 µL 100 bp DNA ladder in reference well. Run at 150–200 V for 15–20 min
detailedSteps.zh: 每孔加载 20 µL PCR 产物。参考孔加 8 µL 100 bp DNA ladder。150–200 V 电泳 15–20 min

detailedSteps.en: Image gel under UV: select 'Nucleic Acids / Ethidium Bromide' protocol, optimize for faint bands. Record genotyping results
detailedSteps.zh: UV 下成像凝胶：选择 '核酸 / 溴化乙锭' 程序，优化弱条带显示。记录基因分型结果

briefSteps.en: Tail snips → alkaline lysis (46 min) → Tris-HCl neutralize → gene-specific PCR (~2.5 h) → 2% agarose gel (150–200 V) → UV imaging → genotype call
briefSteps.zh: 尾尖 → 碱裂解（46 min）→ Tris-HCl 中和 → 基因特异性 PCR（~2.5 h）→ 2% 琼脂糖凝胶（150–200 V）→ UV 成像 → 基因型判定
